---
title: "test_jackknife"
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
**Source:** [`test/test_jackknife.py`](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/test_jackknife.py)
:::


## API Reference

#### `test_uncorrelated_confs_to_jkf_shape` {#test_uncorrelated_confs_to_jkf_shape}

```python
def test_uncorrelated_confs_to_jkf_shape()
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/test_jackknife.py#L10){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `test_jackknife_mean` {#test_jackknife_mean}

```python
def test_jackknife_mean()
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/test_jackknife.py#L17){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `test_jackknife_error` {#test_jackknife_error}

```python
def test_jackknife_error()
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/test_jackknife.py#L28){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `test_jackknife_blocks_numpy_mean` {#test_jackknife_blocks_numpy_mean}

```python
def test_jackknife_blocks_numpy_mean()
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/test_jackknife.py#L36){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---
